status_note_md.en: The Department of State states that foreign nationals who wish to study in the United States generally need a student visa (F or M). Academic study at a university, college, seminary, conservatory, high school, private elementary school, or language training program uses the F category. This record covers F-1 academic study; M-1 vocational study is separate.
status_note_md.zh-Hans: 美国国务院说明，希望在美国学习的外国人通常需要学生签证（F 或 M）。在大学、学院、神学院、音乐学院、高中、私立小学或语言培训项目的学术学习使用 F 类别。本记录覆盖 F-1 学术学习；M-1 职业学习另行处理。

summary_md.en: The main US academic student nonimmigrant route. After acceptance by a SEVP-approved school, the school issues Form I-20 and the student pays the SEVIS I-901 fee, then applies for an F-1 visa (usually with Form DS-160 and an interview). Study in the States says on-campus work is limited (generally no more than 20 hours per week while school is in session) and students must show financial ability before arrival. Many graduates later seek post-completion Optional Practical Training (OPT) or employer-sponsored work such as H-1B.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 美国主要的学术学生非移民途径。获 SEVP 认证学校录取后，学校签发 I-20，学生缴纳 SEVIS I-901 费，再申请 F-1 签证（通常需 DS-160 与面谈）。Study in the States 说明校内工作有限制（学期中一般每周不超过 20 小时），且入境前须证明经济能力。许多毕业生之后申请毕业后 OPT 或 H-1B 等雇主担保工作。

good_for_md.en: Applicants admitted to a SEVP-approved academic school who can pay the SEVIS fee and visa fee, present Form I-20, and show intent and funds consistent with F-1 nonimmigrant study.
good_for_md.zh-Hans: 适合获 SEVP 认证学术院校录取、能支付 SEVIS 与签证费、出示 I-20，并能证明符合 F-1 非移民学习目的与资金条件的申请人。

not_good_for_md.en: People without a SEVP school place, applicants seeking unrestricted employment or a dedicated digital-nomad visa, or those planning degree study on a visitor (B) visa. The United States does not have a dedicated digital-nomad visa in this record.
not_good_for_md.zh-Hans: 不适合没有 SEVP 学校录取、寻求不受限制就业或专门数字游民签证，或计划用访问者（B）签证完成学位学习的人。本记录不将美国描述为提供专门数字游民签证。

note_md.en: You must be accepted by a SEVP-approved school, which registers you in SEVIS and issues Form I-20. Academic requirements are set by the school and programme, not a single federal education floor on the State Department student-visa page.
note_md.zh-Hans: 必须获 SEVP 认证学校录取；学校在 SEVIS 登记并签发 I-20。学术要求由学校与课程设定，国务院学生签证页面没有单一联邦学历门槛。

note_md.en: Study in the States states F-1 students must prove financial ability (for example bank statements) to pay tuition and living expenses while studying. Exact amounts appear on Form I-20 and school guidance.
note_md.zh-Hans: Study in the States 说明 F-1 学生须证明有经济能力支付学费与生活费（例如银行对账单）。具体金额见 I-20 与学校说明。

label.zh-Hans: 非移民签证申请费（MRV / DS-160）

label.en: I-901 SEVIS fee (F or M visa applicants, full payment)
label.zh-Hans: I-901 SEVIS 费（F 或 M 签证申请人全额）

stability_requirement_md.en: The F-1 route uses school cost-of-attendance and financial evidence rather than a recurring employment income threshold.
stability_requirement_md.zh-Hans: F-1 途径使用学校就读费用与资金证明，而不是经常性就业收入门槛。

application_processing_time_md.en: Interview wait times vary by embassy or consulate. New-student F visas can be issued up to 365 days before the course start date, but entry is generally limited to no more than 30 days before the start date.
application_processing_time_md.zh-Hans: 面谈等待时间因使领馆而异。新生 F 签证最早可在开课前 365 天签发，但入境一般不得早于开课前 30 天。

note_md.en: A spouse and unmarried children who will live with the student may apply for F-2 visas with individual Forms I-20. Dependents do not pay the SEVIS fee. F-2 work authorization is not established as available in the retained sources for this record.
note_md.zh-Hans: 将与学生同住的配偶与未婚子女可凭各自 I-20 申请 F-2 签证。受养人无需缴纳 SEVIS 费。保留来源未确认 F-2 可获得工作授权。

summary_md.en: F-1 status is temporary nonimmigrant study. Later temporary work (such as OPT) or employer-sponsored classifications (such as H-1B) may support longer stays and, in some cases, employment-based permanent residence under separate rules.
summary_md.zh-Hans: F-1 是临时非移民学习身份。之后的临时工作（如 OPT）或雇主担保类别（如 H-1B）可能支持更长停留，并在部分情况下依其他规则通向职业类永久居留。

summary_md.en: The F-1 student sources do not establish citizenship eligibility.
summary_md.zh-Hans: F-1 学生来源没有确认公民资格。

rationale_md.en: Core process steps are clear on Department of State, ICE, and Study in the States pages, but school costs, interview waits, and work-authorization details still need case-level checks.
rationale_md.zh-Hans: 国务院、ICE 与 Study in the States 页面核心流程清楚，但学校费用、面谈等待与工作授权细节仍需按案件核对。
